channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government-backed initiatives boost South African cross-border trade confidence
item.description: South African businesses are increasingly optimistic about government support for cross-border trade, according to the latest Africa Trade Barometer from Standard Bank. The report shows South Africa e...

item.title: Managing Street Trading in Urban Areas: Experiences and Lessons
item.description: After the reopening of the renovated Kariakoo Main Market in Dar es Salaam in February 2026, city authorities have started clearing traders from roads, pavements, and bus stops. This step is to reduce...

item.title: Amstel Malta Welcomes Asisat Oshoala as Brand Ambassador to Inspire Nigerians
item.description: Amstel Malta don officially announce say Asisat Oshoala, wey be Nigerian football legend, don become their new brand ambassador. This partnership na to celebrate determination, discipline, and strivin...

item.title: Tanzania and Kenya Discuss Ways to Boost Cross-Border Trade by Removing NTBs
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania na Kenya zimekuwa zikiongelea jinsi ya kuondoa vizuizi visivyo vya ushuru ambavyo vinaendelea kuzuia biashara ya mipaka. Hii ilitangazwa March 4, 2026, baada ya Waziri wa Mamb...

item.title: Benjamin Hundeyin Set to Vacate Position as Force PRO on March 6, 2026 Amid Police Leadership Transition
item.description: The Force Public Relations Officer (FPRO) of the Nigeria Police Force, Benjamin Hundeyin, dey set to leave him position for Abuja today, Friday, March 6, 2026, after only five months on the job. Sourc...

item.title: Political Instability in Peru Reflects Long-Standing Institutional Challenges
item.description: Peru is facing an ongoing political crisis marked by frequent presidential turnovers and institutional instability. In February, interim president José Jerí was removed by Congress after only four mon...

item.title: Breakdown of Nigerian Athletes' Salaries and Endorsement Deals
item.description: Dis article dey explore how top Nigerian athletes dey make money and why some dey earn plenty pass others. Anthony Joshua top the list with $83 million for 2024, because boxing dey give big payouts fo...

item.title: Hundreds of Young Kenyans Compete for a Single High-Risk Job in Senator’s Office
item.description: Nairobi — Kiambu Senator Karungo wa Thang'wa has revealed that his office received 576 applications for a single job position of photographer and video editor, showing the huge pressure young people i...

item.title: Sophisticated iOS Exploit Kit 'Coruna' Proliferates from Suspected US Origins to Russian Spies and Cybercriminals
item.description: Security researchers from Google and iVerify have uncovered 'Coruna,' a highly advanced iPhone hacking toolkit that exploits 23 vulnerabilities in iOS versions 13 through 17.2.1, enabling zero-click m...

item.title: Nigeria to enforce stricter health checks for 2026 Hajj pilgrims
item.description: Nigeria don start serious health preparations for pilgrims wey dey go 2026 Hajj following stricter medical rules wey Saudi Arabia don introduce. Now, all pilgrims must get proper medical clearance to ...

item.title: Melbourne Live Performance Highlights: Music, Dance and Theatre
item.description: This article provides a roundup of recent live performances across Melbourne, covering music, dance, and theatre. At the Tote, Rain Dogs delivered a gritty, atmospheric rock set that drew on '70s synt...

item.title: Labour MP steps aside temporarily following husband's arrest over alleged China espionage
item.description: Labour MP Joani Reid has temporarily stepped down from the Labour Party following the arrest of her husband, David Taylor, on suspicion of spying for China. Reid stated that she is voluntarily suspend...

item.title: Ex-Girardi Keese Attorney Keith Griffin Pleads Guilty to Criminal Contempt in Lion Air Settlement Funds Case
item.description: Keith Griffin, a 54-year-old former lawyer at the now-defunct Girardi Keese firm, pleaded guilty on March 5, 2026, to one count of criminal contempt in federal court in Chicago. He admitted to disobey...

item.title: Minister says only Parliament can amend Constitution amid judges' resignations
item.description: Minister of State for Interior, Talal Chaudhry, has asserted that the exclusive power to amend Pakistan's Constitution lies with Parliament, following criticism from top judges regarding the 27th Cons...

item.title: FIFA don start ticket sales for World Cup play-off with DR Congo confirmed, Nigeria dey wait decision
item.description: Fresh tori don surface for the fight to grab di last slots for 2026 FIFA World Cup. FIFA don officially start to dey sell ticket for di intercontinental play-off tournament wey go hold for Mexico late...

item.title: Rep. Erice accuses House Majority Leader Sandro Marcos of influencing his removal as Senior Deputy Minority Leader
item.description: Caloocan Representative Edgar Erice publicly accused House Majority Leader Sandro Marcos of Ilocos Norte of being involved in his recent removal from the position of House Senior Deputy Minority Leade...

item.title: Researchers convert discarded carrot parts into protein-rich vegan patties using mushrooms
item.description: As India and the world face growing populations, ensuring sustainable and nutritious food sources has become a major concern. Researchers have recently developed a method to convert carrot waste, such...

item.title: Upcoming Notable Australian Books for March 2026
item.description: Guardian Australia editors and critics highlight a diverse range of upcoming Australian book releases for March 2026. Former NSW premier Bob Carr’s memoir, Bring Back Yesterday, is a deeply moving acc...

item.title: Day Six of Iran Conflict Shows Wider Regional Escalation
item.description: On the sixth day of the ongoing war, what began as a concentrated strike against Iran’s leadership and military is now clearly expanding in scope. The US and Israel continue to dominate Iranian airspa...

item.title: Evaluating UK Police Reforms and Their Impact on Public Trust
item.description: Public confidence in police forces across England and Wales has steadily declined over the past decade, with particularly low trust in the Metropolitan Police following the murder of Sarah Everard by ...
